name: Polyram Plastic Industries LTD
summary: Polyram Plastic Industries LTD manufactures and supplies thermoplastic compounds. Its products include engineering plastics; functional polymers, including coupling agents, compatibilizers, impact modifiers, and adhesive resins for applications in automotive, multi-layer film, industrial, and packaging; polytron materials, which are primarily used in automotive sector; and purging agents. The company offers its products through distributors in Israel and internationally. Polyram Plastic Industries LTD was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Moshav Ram-On, Israel.
